meta.principle: Values are UNKNOWN unless an in-repo source exists. Proxies are labelled as proxies and never presented as the DORA metric itself. No estimation, no fabrication.

deployment_frequency.reason: No in-repo deployment log. Production deploys run on Railway/Vercel via merge-to-main triggers; deployment events are not recorded in the repository, so true deployment frequency cannot be measured here.

proxy.name: feature-class commits referencing a Sprint-18 task id merged to origin/main
proxy.caveat: Squash-merge workflow => ~1 mergeable unit per PR. A merge is a *potential* deploy, not a confirmed one.

lead_time_for_changes.reason: Full commit-authored -> deployed-to-prod lead time is not measurable: (a) squash-merge collapses per-commit authoring timestamps, and (b) there is no deploy timestamp source. Per-task completion timestamps in the metrics cache are largely bulk-sync placeholders (28/63 identical shared timestamps), so they cannot stand in for lead time.

proxy.name: single-session exec duration (metrics cache)
proxy.note: Even the non-placeholder subset (14 values, median ~145 min) measures one /exec session, not spec->prod lead time. Not a DORA lead-time value.

change_failure_rate.reason: CFR requires linkage between deployments and the failures they caused. No deployment log exists in-repo, and no deployment<->incident mapping exists.

proxy.name: revert commits on origin/main referencing a Sprint-18 id in window
proxy.note: Known production incidents from ops memory (DB-rotation outage; prod boot crash supabase/Node22) are real but are NOT timestamp-linked to a specific Sprint-18 deployment in-repo, so they cannot be attributed to a CFR numerator here.

mttr.reason: No incident open/resolve timestamps are recorded in the repository. MTTR cannot be computed from git or the metrics tree.

classification_note: By the DORA 2023 bands, "UNKNOWN" is the correct output for all four here: the instrumentation to measure them does not exist in this repo. Wiring deploy + incident telemetry (INFRA-TF-004 monitoring module / IFC-032 OTel) is the prerequisite and is itself a Sprint-18 residual.
